details.IncidentDetail: "[3] RP ADVD SEMI TRUCK IS TRYING TO LEAVE "

"[1] 114-S4 FLOODING THE AREA -- POSS NEEDS CT TO SCRAPE THE RD WHEN FLOODING IS DONE // NOTIFY CT TO PLACE SIGNAGE IN THE AREA"
